calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-19-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Pltf'S Request For Entry Of Court Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Kay Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Kaipo Young, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff 690 Market Club Owners Association.
Plaintiff's Witness John Poss, was placed under oath and examined.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant William m. Valtos, Jr. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $48890.00
Prejudgment Interest - $12093.52
Attorney's Fees - $2175.00
Costs - $1845.00
Total in the amount of $65,003.52

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Continued To May-04-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2011 Continued To Mar-16-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
